PERCYJACKSON-PERCY_JACKSON.description:
Percy Jackson
Charismatic son of Poseidon visiting the Spire on a quest for college recommendations. One of the most powerful demigods alive.
Utilizes waterbending and experienced swordplay to survive.
PERCYJACKSON-PERCY_JACKSON.goldMonologue: Line spoken when obtaining a large amount of gold
PERCYJACKSON-PERCY_JACKSON.title: The Stormbringer
